jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at DMart
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with DMart! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
